rows.description: Money Rent due Michs. 1805
rows.notes: Revised from initial visual reading. gpt-5-mini correctly identified the amount as 265 pounds. While the digit could be mistaken for '0', the subsequent subtotal of 276.18.8, combined with the Corn Rent of 11.18.8, confirms the Money Rent must be 265. The spelling 'Michs.' from gemini-flash is retained. Shillings/pence are dashes.
rows.english_description: Money rent due at Michaelmas 1805.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Money rent due at Michaelmas 1805, amounting to £265 0s 0d.
